scripts.start: concurrently "npm --prefix frontend start" "dotnet run --project backend/backend.csproj --launch-profile http" "npm run open:swagger"
scripts.open:swagger: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$url = 'http://localhost:5100/swagger'; for ($i = 0; $i -lt 30; $i++) { try { Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing $url -TimeoutSec 1 | Out-Null; Start-Process $url; exit 0 } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 } }; exit 1"
